---
title: "ED Fig 6e - MRLC and Arp3 patch lifetime"
author: "Lin et al., Nature 2026 (Bradke lab, DZNE)"
output: html_notebook
---

<!--
# Arp3 / MRLC patch lifetime + diffusion velocity (alternative-cohort variant)

## What this file does

Alternative-cohort variant sourced from `D:\DVElite`. Reads ComDet trajectory
+ MSD CSVs (`Tra_file`, `MSD_file` from `Path_1`, lines 67, 73, 86-87) for
MRLC and Arp3 patches in growth cones, neurite shafts and soma. Per-track
moving velocity (from MSD slope) and lifetime are computed per patch, then
pooled by region. Three PDFs are written (`ggsave` at lines 168, 312, 326)
producing the violin + boxplot comparisons.

## Manuscript panel

**ED Fig 6e**: "Arp3 and MRLC patch lifetime. For Arp3 patches: N = 2490 for
patch number at the growth cones, 1203 at the neurite shafts and 2206 at the
soma from time-lapsed images of 12 neurons from 3 independent experiments.
For MRLC patches: N = 2995 at the growth cones, 3920 at the neurite shafts
and 2703 at the soma from time-lapsed images of 11 neurons from 3 independent
experiments. ***p < 0.001 by Two-tailed Kruskal-Wallis test followed by
Dunn's post-hoc test with Bonferroni correction. Exact P values are shown."

## Outputs

- Three violin + boxplot PDFs (`ggsave` at lines 168, 312, 326).

## Original D:\ source

D:/DVElite/Myl_patch_quant_ExtFig. 6e/Patch_analysis.Rmd
-->

<!--
================================================================================
  PANEL TARGETS (Lin et al., Nature 2026)
================================================================================
  Manuscript figure title (ED Fig 6):
    "Myosin II and Arp2/3 complex assemble spatially discrete actin networks"

  * ED Fig 6e - Arp3 and MRLC patch lifetime by compartment (GC/shaft/soma).
                For Arp3: N = 2490/1203/2206 (same as ED Fig 3f).
                For MRLC: N = 2995/3920/2703 (12 neurons, 3 experiments).
                Output: Myl_Arp3_LifeTime.eps, Myl_Arp3_LifeTime.csv

  Essentiality: Replicate-QC. Canonical:
                edfig06g_patch_profile_corr_canonical.Rmd.
  D:\ source:   D:\DVElite\Myl_patch_quant_ExtFig. 6e\Patch_analysis.Rmd

  Re-applied: 2026-05-12 (after pass-3 regression recovery).
================================================================================
-->

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

library(pracma)
library(peakPick)
library(quantmod)
library(ggpmisc)
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggfortify)
library(forecast)
library(tsibble)
library(broom)
library(tidyquant)
library(tsbox)
library("pheatmap")
library("RColorBrewer")
library(ggpmisc)
library(ggfortify)
library(viridis) # Default Color Maps from 'matplotlib' 
library(hrbrthemes)
library(circular)
library("gridExtra") 
library("ggExtra") 
library("ggpubr")
```

```{r Load RData, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
dir  <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
setwd(dir)
saved_path <- paste(dir, "Patch_dynamic.RData",  sep = "/")
load(file=saved_path)

#save.image(file=saved_path)
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
Path_1<- dir

Tra_file<- list.files(Path_1,
                      pattern = "_Tra(.*)csv$|^Traj.*\\.csv$",
                     recursive = TRUE,  #list of subfolders and files within the subfolders
                     include.dirs = F, # Should subdirectory names be included 
                     full.name = TRUE)  #get the full name (path and file name) of each file

MSD_file<- list.files(Path_1,
                      pattern = "_MSD(.*)csv$",
                     recursive = TRUE,  #list of subfolders and files within the subfolders
                     include.dirs = F, # Should subdirectory names be included 
                     full.name = TRUE)  #get the full name (path and file name) of each file

# dirname(Path_1)

Tra_list<- list()
MSD_list<- list()

for (n in 1:length(Tra_file)) 
{
  Tra_list[[n]] <- readr::read_delim(Tra_file[n], ",", escape_double = FALSE, col_names = T, trim_ws = TRUE) %>% as.data.frame()
  MSD_list[[n]] <- readr::read_delim(MSD_file[n], ",", escape_double = FALSE, col_names = T, trim_ws = TRUE) %>% as.data.frame()
  names(MSD_list[[n]]) <- c("X1", "Tra", "Tra_length", "MSS_slope", "MSS_yIn", "MSD_slope", "MSD_yIn", "DiffCoef", "Dist", "AvgDist", "Straightness", "Bending", "BendingLinear", "Efficiency", "PixelSize", "TimeInterval")
  names(Tra_list)[n]<- Tra_file[n] %>% basename()
  names(MSD_list)[n]<- Tra_file[n] %>% basename()
  
}

```

# Calculate the frequency of frame number of each pacth/trajectory
```{r}
frame_freq_list <- list()
for (n in 1:length(Tra_list)) 
{
 
  df <- Tra_list[[n]]$Trajectory %>% table() %>% as.data.frame()
  padded<-sprintf("%02d", n)
  df$Region<- paste("Region_", padded)
  df$Type<- dirname(Tra_file[n]) %>% basename()
  df$cell <- names(Tra_list)[n]  %>% gsub("\\_D3D.*","",.)
  df$POI<- "Myl"
  frame_freq_list[[n]] <- df
}

names(frame_freq_list) <- Tra_file

frame_freq <- frame_freq_list %>% reduce(bind_rows)

```

# Remove outliers
```{r}
frame_freq_GC<- frame_freq %>% subset(frame_freq$Type=="GC")
outliers_GC <-  boxplot(frame_freq_GC$Freq, plot=FALSE)$out

frame_freq_Soma<- frame_freq %>% subset(frame_freq$Type=="Soma")
outliers_Soma <-  boxplot(frame_freq_Soma$Freq, plot=FALSE)$out

frame_freq_NT<- frame_freq %>% subset(frame_freq$Type=="NT")
outliers_NT <-  boxplot(frame_freq_NT$Freq, plot=FALSE)$out

frame_freq_GC <- frame_freq_GC[-which(frame_freq_GC$Freq %in% outliers_GC),]
frame_freq_Soma <- frame_freq_Soma[-which(frame_freq_Soma$Freq %in% outliers_Soma),]
frame_freq_NT <- frame_freq_NT[-which(frame_freq_NT$Freq %in% outliers_NT),]

frame_freq <- rbind(frame_freq_GC, frame_freq_Soma, frame_freq_NT)

frame_freq $cell %>% table()
```

```{r}
frame_freq_OL$Freq <- (frame_freq_OL$Freq-1)*5
```

```{r}
filename <- file.choose()
frame_freq_OL_Arp3 <- readRDS(filename)

frame_freq_Arp3_Myl<- rbind(frame_freq_OL, frame_freq_OL_Arp3 )
```

```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=8}
ylim1 = boxplot.stats(frame_freq$Freq)$stats[c(1, 5)] #+ coord_cartesian(ylim = ylim1*1.05) 
my_comparisons <- list( c("Soma", "GC"), c("GC", "NT"), c("Soma", "NT") )

ggplot(frame_freq_Arp3_Myl, aes(x=Type, y=Freq, fill=POI)) + 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + 
  theme_classic()+
  geom_violin(trim=F, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1.5) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.2,  aes(x=Type, y=Freq, fill=POI))+
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0 ,50), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5)) +
  #stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, label.y = c(16, 18, 20))+ # Add pairwise comparisons p-value
  #stat_compare_means(label.y = 22)     # Add global p-value 
  geom_pwc(
    aes(group = POI), tip.length = 0,
    method = "wilcox.test", label = "{p.adj.format}{p.adj.signif}",
    # p.adjust.method = "bonferroni", p.adjust.by = "panel",
    bracket.nudge.y = 0.12) 
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "Myl_Arp3_LifeTime.eps",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "eps")
```

```{r}
frame_freq_Arp3_Myl %>% write_csv("Myl_Arp3_LifeTime.csv")
```

```{r}
for (n in 1:length(MSD_list)) 
{
  df <- MSD_list[[n]]
  padded<-sprintf("%02d", n)
  df$Region <- paste("Region_", padded)
  df$Type<- dirname(MSD_file[n]) %>% basename()
  df$cell <- names(MSD_list)[n] %>% fs::path_file() %>% gsub("\\-.*","",.)
  df$POI<- "Myl"
  MSD_list[[n]] <- df
}

# combine MSD dfs
MSD_Myl<- MSD_list %>% reduce(bind_rows)
```

# Remove outliers
```{r}
MSD_GC<- MSD_Myl %>% subset(MSD_Myl$Type=="GC")
outliers_GC <-  boxplot(MSD_GC$DiffCoef, plot=FALSE)$out

MSD_Soma<- MSD_Myl %>% subset(MSD_Myl$Type=="Soma")
outliers_Soma <-  boxplot(MSD_Soma$DiffCoef, plot=FALSE)$out

MSD_NT<- MSD_Myl %>% subset(MSD_Myl$Type=="NT")
outliers_NT <-  boxplot(MSD_NT$DiffCoef, plot=FALSE)$out

MSD_GC <- MSD_GC[-which(MSD_GC$DiffCoef %in% outliers_GC),]
MSD_Soma <- MSD_Soma[-which(MSD_Soma$DiffCoef %in% outliers_Soma),]
MSD_NT <- MSD_NT[-which(MSD_NT$DiffCoef %in% outliers_NT),]

MSD_Myl <- rbind(MSD_GC, MSD_Soma, MSD_NT)
```

```{r}
filename <- file.choose()
MSD_Arp3 <- readRDS(filename)
```

```{r}
MSD_GC<- MSD_Arp3  %>% subset(MSD_Arp3$Type=="GC")
outliers_GC <-  boxplot(MSD_GC$DiffCoef, plot=FALSE)$out

MSD_Soma<- MSD_Arp3 %>% subset(MSD_Arp3$Type=="Soma")
outliers_Soma <-  boxplot(MSD_Soma$DiffCoef, plot=FALSE)$out

MSD_NT<- MSD_Arp3 %>% subset(MSD_Arp3$Type=="NT")
outliers_NT <-  boxplot(MSD_NT$DiffCoef, plot=FALSE)$out

MSD_GC <- MSD_GC[-which(MSD_GC$DiffCoef %in% outliers_GC),]
MSD_Soma <- MSD_Soma[-which(MSD_Soma$DiffCoef %in% outliers_Soma),]
MSD_NT <- MSD_NT[-which(MSD_NT$DiffCoef %in% outliers_NT),]

MSD_Arp3 <- rbind(MSD_GC, MSD_Soma, MSD_NT)
```

```{r}
MSD_Myl_Arp3<- rbind(MSD_Myl, MSD_Arp3)
```

```{r}
MSD_ggplot_list <- list()

for (n in 1:length(names(MSD_Myl_Arp3))) 
{
  MSD_ggplot_list[[n]] <- ggplot(MSD_Myl_Arp3, aes_string(x="Type", y=names(MSD_Myl_Arp3)[n], fill="POI")) 
}

names(MSD_ggplot_list)<- c("X1", "Tra", "Tra_length", "MSS_slope", "MSS_yIn", "MSD_slope", "MSD_yIn", "DiffCoef", "Dist", "AvgDist", "Straightness", "Bending", "BendingLinear", "Efficiency", "PixelSize", "TimeInterval")
```

```{r  message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
fig_A <- ggplot(frame_freq_Arp3_Myl, aes(x=Type, y=Freq, fill=POI)) + 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + theme_classic()+
  geom_violin(trim=F, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1.5) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, aes(fill=POI))+
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), 
                     limits = c(0 ,80), 
                     breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5)) +
  #geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white")+
  #stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons) + 
  geom_pwc(
    aes(group = POI), tip.length = 0,
    method = "wilcox.test", label = "{p.adj.format}{p.adj.signif}",
    # p.adjust.method = "bonferroni", p.adjust.by = "panel",
    bracket.nudge.y = 0.08) 
  
fig_B <- MSD_ggplot_list[["DiffCoef"]]+ 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + theme_classic()+
  geom_violin(trim=F, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, aes(fill=POI))+
  #stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons) + 
  geom_pwc(
    aes(group = POI), tip.length = 0,
    method = "wilcox.test", label = "{p.adj.format}{p.adj.signif}",
    # p.adjust.method = "bonferroni", p.adjust.by = "panel",
    bracket.nudge.y = 0.1) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::unit_format(unit = "", scale = 1e12), 
                     expand = c(0, 0), 
                     limits = c(-0.4e-14 ,0.5e-13), 
                     breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5)) 

fig_C <- MSD_ggplot_list[["MSS_slope"]] + 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + theme_classic()+
  geom_violin(trim=F, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=0.5) +
  #geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white")+
  #stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept=0.5, linetype="dashed", color = "red")+
  geom_pwc(
    aes(group = POI), tip.length = 0,
    method = "wilcox.test", label = "{p.adj.format}{p.adj.signif}",
    # p.adjust.method = "bonferroni", p.adjust.by = "panel",
    bracket.nudge.y = 0.08) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1)), 
                     limits = c(-2 ,1.5), 
                     breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 8))

fig_D <- MSD_ggplot_list[["AvgDist"]]+ 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + theme_classic()+
  geom_violin(trim=F, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::unit_format(unit = "", scale = 1e6), 
                     expand = c(0, 0), 
                     limits = c(0 ,0.6e-6), 
                     breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 8)) +
 geom_boxplot(width=0.1, aes(fill=POI))+
  #stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons) + 
  geom_pwc(
    aes(group = POI), tip.length = 0,
    method = "wilcox.test", label = "{p.adj.format}{p.adj.signif}",
    # p.adjust.method = "bonferroni", p.adjust.by = "panel",
    bracket.nudge.y = 0.12)
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "Myl_Arp3_DiffCoef.eps",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "eps")
```

```{r  message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
ggpubr::ggarrange(fig_A,fig_B,fig_C, fig_D,
                  labels = LETTERS[1:4],
                  ncol = 2, nrow = 2,  legend="none")
 
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "Myl_dyn_2.eps",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "eps")
```

```{r,  message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=6}
MSD_ggplot_list[["MSS_slope"]] + 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + theme_classic()+
  geom_violin(trim=F, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=0.5) +
  #geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white")+
  #stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept=0.5, linetype="dashed", color = "red")+
  geom_pwc(
    aes(group = POI), tip.length = 0,
    method = "wilcox.test", label = "{p.adj.format}{p.adj.signif}",
    # p.adjust.method = "bonferroni", p.adjust.by = "panel",
    bracket.nudge.y = 0.08) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1)), limits = c(-2 ,1.5), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 8))
```

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
dir  <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
setwd(dir)
saved_path <- paste(dir, "Patch_dynamic.RData",  sep = "/")
#load(file=saved_path)

save.image(file=saved_path)
```

```{r,  message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
fig_A<- fviz_pca_var (res.pca, 
             col.var="contrib", # Control variable colors using their contributions
             axes = 1:2, 
             gradient.cols = c("#00AFBB", "#E7B800", "#FC4E07"),
             repel = TRUE)

fig_B<- fviz_pca_ind(res.pca, col.ind = "cos2", # Control automatically the color of individuals using the cos2. cos2 = the quality of the individuals on the factor map
            # gradient.cols = c("#00AFBB", "#E7B800", "#FC4E07"),
             palette="npg",
            label="none",
            axes = c(1, 2),
             habillage = "Type", # Use gradient color
             repel = TRUE)

fig_C<- fviz_pca_ind(res.pca, col.ind = "cos2", # Control automatically the color of individuals using the cos2. cos2 = the quality of the individuals on the factor map
            # gradient.cols = c("#00AFBB", "#E7B800", "#FC4E07"),
             palette="npg",
            label="none",
            axes = c(1, 2),
             habillage = "Type", # Use gradient color
             repel = TRUE)

ggpubr::ggarrange(fig_A, fig_B, fig_C,
                  labels = c("A", "B", "C"), ncol = 3, nrow = 1, align="hv", legend="none")
```

```{r, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}

targetDT<- MSD [, c(3:14)]

library(umap)
set.seed(12345)  

DT_sample_merge_imp.umap <- umap(targetDT, method="umap-learn", n_components= 5, n_neighbors=50)

library(Rtsne)
library(tsne)

set.seed(1234) 
DT_sample_merge_imp.tsne <- as.matrix(targetDT) %>% Rtsne(perplexity=50, dims=3, initial_dims=10, check_duplicates = FALSE) # Run TSNE
```

```{r}
layout <- DT_sample_merge_imp.umap$layout # DT_sample_merge_imp.umap$layout or DT_sample_merge_imp.tsne$Y
colnames(layout) <- paste0("UMAP_", 1:dim(layout)[2])

layout <- DT_sample_merge_imp.tsne$Y
colnames(layout) <- paste0("tSNE_", 1:dim(layout)[2])
```

```{r analysis3, message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
ggplot(as.data.frame(layout), aes_string(x=colnames(layout)[1], y=colnames(layout)[2])) +  
  geom_point(aes(size=MSD$MSS_slope, colour = MSD$DiffCoef))  + 
  scale_color_gradient2(low = "blue", mid="white", high = "red", midpoint=0) +
  labs(x=colnames(layout)[1], y= colnames(layout)[2], color="DiffCoef", size="MSS_slope")+ 
  geom_rug(alpha=.5)

sp <- ggplot(as.data.frame(layout), aes_string(x=colnames(layout)[1], y=colnames(layout)[2])) +  
  geom_point(aes(size=MSD$DiffCoef, colour = MSD$Type))  + 
  labs(x=colnames(layout)[1], y= colnames(layout)[2], color="Type", size="MSS_slope")+ 
  geom_rug(col="darkred",alpha=.5)

ggMarginal(sp, groupColour = TRUE, groupFill = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# rename dataframe names within the dataframe list 

subfolder_name_list <- list.files(path =Path_1, full.names = F, recursive = FALSE)

names(df_1)[2:(length(df_list)+1)] <- subfolder_name_list[ grepl("R3D", subfolder_name_list) ]
```

```{r}
Path_1= "G:/EB3"
Rdata_list<- list.files(Path_1,
                      pattern = "df_list",
                     recursive = TRUE,  #list of subfolders and files within the subfolders
                     include.dirs = F, # Should subdirectory names be included 
                     full.name = TRUE)  #get the full name (path and file name) of each file
```

```{r}
df_1 <- t(df_1) %>% as.data.frame()
col<-df_1[1, ]
colnames(df_1) <- col
df_1<-df_1[-1, ]

df_1[]<- lapply(df_1, as.numeric)

df_1$X1<- rownames(df_1)
df_1$Arp3<-"WT"
df_1$Path<- dirname(Path_1)

saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "df_list.RData",  sep = "/")
save(df_list, df_1, csv_list, Path_1, file = saved_path)

```

```{r}
data_summary <- function(x) {
   m <- mean(x)
   ymin <- m-sd(x)
   ymax <- m+sd(x)
   return(c(y=m,ymin=ymin,ymax=ymax))
}

graph_list<- list()

graph_list[[1]]<- ggplot(df_1, aes(x= Arp3, y=growth_speed_median)) 
graph_list[[2]]<- ggplot(df_1, aes(x=Arp3, y=growth_lifetime_mean)) 
graph_list[[3]]<- ggplot(df_1, aes(x= Arp3, y=growth_length_mean))
```

```{r}
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "df_list.RData",  sep = "/")
save(df_list, df_1, csv_list, Path_1, graph_list, file = saved_path)
csvPath<- paste(Path_1, "df_1.csv",  sep = "/")
write.csv(df_1[ ,c(4,7,10)], file=csvPath)
```

```{r, fig.width=2, fig.height=4, echo=FALSE}
graph_list[[1]] + 
  geom_violin(trim=FALSE, bw=1)+ 
stat_summary(fun.data=data_summary)+ 
  geom_dotplot(binaxis='y', stackdir='center', dotsize=1, binwidth = 0.2)

graph_list[[1]]+
  geom_violin(trim=FALSE, fill='#A4A4A4', color="darkred", bw=1)+
  geom_boxplot(width=0.5) + theme_minimal()
```
